overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character navigates a busy urban street with neon signs, palm tree planters, overhead walkways, and futuristic flying vehicles visible between towering buildings covered in digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with hotel and commercial buildings

events.description: character begins to slow and prepare for turning at the intersection
black sedan drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to corrugated metal building wall, approaching the Muren street intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: neon hotel sign with Japanese characters and blue lettering
large vertical digital billboard with red and white vertical stripes
building facade with horizontal corrugated metal panels
blue street sign with white text reading Muren mounted on black pole

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk beside a building with corrugated metal walls, approaching an intersection in a futuristic city. Neon signs including a hotel sign with Japanese characters illuminate the scene. A black sedan drives past on the left as the character approaches the Muren street sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved city street with palm tree planters and elevated walkways

events.description: turns left at intersection onto street lined with palm trees in large planters
navigates around pedestrians while maintaining forward momentum along curved path

agents.ego_description: turning left at the Muren intersection and proceeding along a curved sidewalk lined with palm tree planters

notable_agents.action: woman in bright red pants walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large white rectangular planters containing tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
futuristic flying car visible in the sky between tall buildings

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the intersection onto a curved street lined with large white planters containing palm trees. Flying vehicles are visible in the sky between futuristic buildings. The character navigates past pedestrians including a woman in red pants while walking beneath elevated walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with multi-level digital billboards and overhead walkways

events.description: entering denser area with large overhead digital billboards becoming prominent
waiting for pedestrian traffic to clear while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking straight through busy sidewalk with many pedestrians while passing under large digital billboards and neon signs

notable_agents.action: bald man in brown jacket walking directly toward camera before passing

entered.detail: blue and red neon news station sign with white text reading WVRE NEWS
massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements spanning the street
tall building with glass facade and multiple balconies

segments.scene_description: The character continues down a dense urban canyon with towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards and neon signs. The WVRE NEWS sign glows on the right while palm tree planters continue along the left. The character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic including a bald man in a brown jacket, passing beneath elevated walkways in this futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban district that evolves from a narrow industrial sidewalk into a towering futuristic canyon. It begins beside corrugated metal walls and glowing Japanese hotel signs, moving toward an intersection as a black sedan drives past the Muren street sign. As the character turns left, the environment opens into a curved street lined with large white palm tree planters and elevated walkways, with flying vehicles gliding between the buildings above. The scene then expands into a dense corridor of skyscrapers draped in massive digital billboards, passing the glowing WVRE NEWS sign and navigating through a crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the cityscape, weaving past citizens beneath the overhead structures of the high-tech metropolis.
